notes: This file defines SDT skill profiles. End users should NOT need to know any skill name.
SDT resolves a domain from spec/repo signals, picks a profile, then maps logical capabilities to concrete skill folders.
Resolution must follow sdt/ff.md 'Skills (host compatibility)' (search .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md then .cursor/skills/<name>/SKILL.md).
Fallback rule: if a domain/profile-mapped skill is missing on the current host, fall back to defaultProfile for the same logical key.
